    [*] --> OFF

    OFF --> TAKEOFF: TAKEOFF_REQUEST [can_takeoff()]

    LAND --> EMERGENCY_LAND: EMERGENCY_REQUEST\nWATCHDOG_ERROR\nHEALTH_CHECK_FAILED [update() fallback] (synthetic)
    EMERGENCY_LAND --> OFF: EMERGENCY_COMPLETED
    VELOCITY_CONTROL --> EMERGENCY_LAND: EMERGENCY_REQUEST\nWATCHDOG_ERROR\nHEALTH_CHECK_FAILED [update() fallback] (synthetic)
    VELOCITY_CONTROL --> BREAKING: EXIT_CONTROL_MODE
    POSE_CONTROL --> EMERGENCY_LAND: EMERGENCY_REQUEST\nWATCHDOG_ERROR\nHEALTH_CHECK_FAILED [update() fallback] (synthetic)
    POSE_CONTROL --> BREAKING: EXIT_CONTROL_MODE
    REFERENCE_CONTROL --> EMERGENCY_LAND: EMERGENCY_REQUEST\nWATCHDOG_ERROR\nHEALTH_CHECK_FAILED [update() fallback] (synthetic)
    REFERENCE_CONTROL --> BREAKING: EXIT_CONTROL_MODE
    TRAJECTORY_CONTROL --> HOVER: TRAJECTORY_COMPLETED

    BREAKING --> EMERGENCY_LAND: EMERGENCY_REQUEST\nWATCHDOG_ERROR\nHEALTH_CHECK_FAILED [update() fallback] (synthetic)

    note right of OFF
